E1_E3_holography.finding: Holography task produces completely different observables: E ~14, Coh ~0.73, Decision=Retry (not Commit). No bistability visible in 3 runs — all tight cluster at low E / mid coherence.
E1_E3_holography.hypothesis_verdict: H5 TENTATIVELY CONFIRMED: Holography has different basin structure than harmonic. Not bimodal in small sample.

E4_steps5.verdict: All 5 episodes LOW regime (session-locked in this case)

E5_steps10.verdict: Basin flips WITHIN a session — H9 partially confirmed

statistics.consecutive_same_basin_runs: LOW x3, HIGH x1, LOW x1, HIGH x1, LOW x4

E5_steps10.finding: Basin selection is PER-EPISODE, not per-session. Each episode has independent basin probability. Between-episode flipping proves the basin is a runtime property, not an initialization lock.

E6_soak.verdict: Soak mode runs 100 episodes — killed at 136s before first completion
E6_soak.note: --soak N runs 20x N episodes (100 for soak=5). Too long for interactive testing.

E8_inference_mode.finding: Inference mode always runs T1: Contraction and always returns identical receipt regardless of --task, --asymmetry, --rotation, --use-layernorm, --enable-truth-sensor, or CPU/GPU selection. State hash before = state hash after (no state change). coherence=1.0, all error metrics=0. This is a prebuilt stub.
E8_inference_mode.implication: The real observable science happens in training mode only. Inference mode is architecture evidence but not a live computational surface.

cross_cutting_findings: Per-episode basin selection proves bistability is a runtime property of the harmonic training loop, not an initialization artifact
The holography task has a third attractor family (E~14, Coh~0.73, Decision=Retry) distinct from harmonic's two basins
The inference mode runs named tests (T1 Contraction) that map to the manifesto's T-registry, but the implementation is a stub
--soak N multiplies episodes by 20 — likely a deeper training schedule

hypothesis_updates.H9_multi_step_convergence: PARTIAL — basin flips per-episode, not convergence to fixed point
hypothesis_updates.H11_soak_mode: PARTIAL — soak exists, runs longer (100 episodes for soak=5), uninterpretable in brief time
